title: security_check
description: GoPlus-powered token security scan. Returns a nested checks object with 13 boolean/numeric fields covering honeypot, ownership, proxy, minting, blacklisting, and holder concentration.

token_address.description: 0x-prefixed contract address on Base (40 hex characters)

attestation.description: Request EIP-712 signed attestation (Base chain ID 8453)

safe.description: Overall safety verdict (false if any critical flag is set)

checks.description: Nested checks object with all 13 security flags

verified_source.description: Contract source code is verified on explorer

can_take_back_ownership.description: Owner can reclaim ownership after renouncing

is_open_source.description: Contract source code is publicly available

external_call.description: Contract makes external calls to unknown addresses

transfer_pausable.description: Token transfers can be paused by owner

trading_cooldown.description: Token enforces a trading cooldown period

top10_holder_percent.description: Percentage of supply held by top 10 wallets

creator_percent.description: Percentage of supply held by contract creator

attestation.description: EIP-712 signed attestation (only present when requested)
